validation.scriptReliefThin: Script relief is too thin ({{value}}mm). Recommended minimum: {{min}}mm.
validation.letterThin: Letter is very thin ({{value}}mm). Consider at least {{min}}mm.
validation.zeroTolerance: Fit clearance is 0. Parts will likely not slot together after printing.
validation.pocketTooDeep: Script pocket deeper than half the letter thickness ({{letterThk}}mm). May weaken the piece.
validation.scriptTooTall: Script name is taller than 85% of the big letter. It may overflow.
validation.baseTooThin: Base too thin for the embed depth. Consider raising to at least {{min}}mm.

nameWithScript.name: Name with script
nameWithScript.description: Large initial with the full name overlaid in cursive
